message:
fix(sandbox): allow multi-level wildcard subdomain matching

- egress.rs: remove single-level subdomain restriction so that
  patterns like *.trusted.com correctly match deep subdomains
  (e.g. deep.sub.trusted.com), not just one level deep.
- allow_deny_matrix.rs: update test to verify deep subdomain
  matching works and remove outdated single-level comments.
- CBOR test vectors regenerated with new key hex values from
  upstream enrollment/simulate vector updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
